title: drypetes afzelii
intro: Drypetes afzelii, also known as the African bush oil tree, is a plant species that belongs to the family Phyllanthaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Drypetes afzelii include its ability to treat skin conditions, wounds, and infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the leaves and seeds of the plant are often extracted and used to make oils, ointments, and tinctures, which can be applied topically or taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
